prompt: Selling a Nintendo Switch OLED. Comes with: the dock, 2 Joy-Con sets (but the left Joy-Con on one pair has drift — totally playable but noticeable), and 3 games in original boxes: Zelda Breath of the Wild, Mario Kart 8 Deluxe, Animal Crossing New Horizons. The console itself is in great shape, screen is perfect.

assertions.description: The Joy-Con drift is disclosed in the listing body — not just in seller notes
The pricing accounts for the Joy-Con drift as a discount factor vs a fully working bundle
The three games are listed in the ad (they add meaningful value and should be itemised)
Output has: emoji header (🏷️), title line, price line, description block, seller notes separator (—— seller notes), and three-price breakdown (Target | Floor | Garage sale)
